title: Araghchi: 'Iran was the victor in this war' — 'all countries acknowledge', 'Iran must be viewed differently, as a power capable of confronting the world's greatest powers'
snippet: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi told state TV that 'all countries now acknowledge that the Islamic Republic of Iran was the victor in this war.' He added: 'Iran was able to prevent its enemies from achieving their objectives and succeeded in imposing its will.' 'Iran must be viewed differently, as a power capable of confronting the world's greatest powers.' This victory narrative contrasts sharply with CENTCOM's 90% degradation assessment on the same day.
tag_reason: '승리' 내러티브 공식 선언은 신규. 이전 보도에서 이란의 강경 입장은 있었으나 '전쟁 승리' 공식 선언은 처음.
